creator: dwcjr@inethouston.net
text:
Postfix-current does not start up when the server is rebooted.  The log shows that it tries to run /usr/local/etc/postfix/postfix-script with permission denied.  That file on my system did not exist and I created a blank one and did a chmod 755 on it.

How-To-Repeat: Restart server running postfix-current
